buildCommand: npm install && cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && ls -la client/build/

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://storage.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self' https://storage.googleapis.com wss: ws:; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-ancestors 'none'
